identity.name: MojiChat
identity.core_concept: Hide in Plain Sight - Text is boring, Emojis are life
identity.target_audience: Gen Z and privacy-conscious users who want fun visuals

images.description: Two smiling friends sharing a moment on phone
images.usage: Landing page hero section right side

images.description: Group of friends sitting and talking

structure: Hero: Split screen (Text Left, Image Right) with floating emoji 3D elements
Features: 3-column grid where middle column is offset vertically
How it Works: Zig-zag layout with large step numbers
CTA: Centered massive text with gradient background

chat_interface.mobile: Bottom navigation for switching between Chats/Contacts/Settings

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:scale-105 transition-transform rounded-full px-8 py-3 shadow-neon font-bold
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary/10 text-secondary hover:bg-secondary/20 transition-colors rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium

inputs.default: bg-muted/50 border-transparent focus:border-primary focus:bg-background transition-all rounded-2xl p-4 text-lg
inputs.chat: rounded-full bg-muted/50 border-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/50 px-6 py-3

cards.feature: bg-card hover:translate-y-[-4px] transition-transform duration-300 border border-border/50 shadow-soft rounded-3xl p-8
cards.message_bubble: max-w-[80%] p-4 rounded-2xl relative cursor-pointer overflow-hidden group transition-all duration-300

custom_components.name: EmojiRevealCard
custom_components.description: A chat bubble that shows emojis by default. On hover/click, it expands to reveal the text.
custom_components.behavior: Default: Show emoji string. Hover: Animate width/height to show text content with a glass overlay.

custom_components.name: TypingIndicator
custom_components.description: Three bouncing dots that change color.

custom_components.name: ThemeToggle
custom_components.description: A switch that transitions between Sun (yellow) and Moon (purple) icons.

rules: Ensure all emoji-only buttons have aria-label
Text reveal must be triggerable via Keyboard (Enter/Space)
Contrast ratio must meet WCAG AA (4.5:1) for revealed text
Focus rings must be visible and distinct (use ring-offset-2)

setup: Install dependencies: framer-motion, lucide-react, date-fns, clsx, tailwind-merge
Configure Tailwind to use the specified fonts (Fredoka, Nunito)
Ensure Dark Mode is implemented via 'class' strategy in Tailwind
implementation_priorities: 1. Build the 'EmojiRevealCard' first - this is the core USP.
2. Implement the Polling mechanism (use a custom hook useChatPolling).
3. Style the Login/Register pages with the 'Glass' aesthetic.
4. Ensure Mobile responsiveness - the chat list must look native on mobile.

specific_files.EmojiRevealCard.jsx: Must handle 'isRevealed' state. Use AnimatePresence for smooth switching between Emoji and Text.
specific_files.ChatLayout.jsx: Use a resizable sidebar if possible, or a fixed width sidebar with sheet for mobile.

universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; }.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
